SEARCH
程序包 com.example.eventparticipation

类 Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventparticipation.Event
public class Event extends Object
Model class representing an event owned by an organizer.

This class is used by organizer dashboard and event management screens. It stores core event information such as scheduling, capacity, counts, venue, and poster image URL.

Relevant user stories:

  • US 02.04.01 - Upload event poster
  • US 02.04.02 - Update event poster

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Event()
    Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
    Event(String id, String organizerId, String name, Date startTime, int capacity, Date registrationEnd, String posterUrl, int waitingCount, int selectedCount, int enrolledCount, String venueAddress)
    Creates a fully populated event instance.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Event

      public Event()
      Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • Event

      public Event(String id, String organizerId, String name, Date startTime, int capacity, Date registrationEnd, String posterUrl, int waitingCount, int selectedCount, int enrolledCount, String venueAddress)
      Creates a fully populated event instance.
      参数:
      id - event id
      organizerId - organizer id
      name - event name
      startTime - event start time
      capacity - event capacity
      registrationEnd - registration closing time
      posterUrl - poster download URL
      waitingCount - number of waiting entrants
      selectedCount - number of selected entrants
      enrolledCount - number of enrolled entrants
      venueAddress - venue address
